stories.title: **Headline:** No. 5 Florida at No. 12 FSU Tonight — Top-15 Rivalry on ESPN2, National Seeds on the Line

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
No. 5 Florida is in Tallahassee tonight. 🥎

Florida (43-6) at No. 12 FSU (39-7).
ESPN2. 6 PM ET.

Two top-15 teams. Both undefeated vs in-state opponents.
One streak ends tonight.

National seeds are on the line. #FSUSoftball #GatorsSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
90 minutes to first pitch. 🥎

No. 5 Florida vs. No. 12 FSU.
JoAnne Graf Field, Tallahassee. ESPN2 at 6 PM ET.

Florida: .366 team BA. FSU: .365 team BA.
This one is going to be close.

#GatorsSoftball #FSUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: No. 5 Florida at No. 12 FSU: Top-15 Rivalry Tonight on ESPN2 with National Seeds on the Line

stories.title: **Headline:** NFCA Week 12 Poll: Oklahoma Holds No. 1 Despite Wild Week — Alabama Surges

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Every top-5 team in college softball lost this week. 🥎

Oklahoma still holds No. 1 (12 first-place votes).
Alabama rises to No. 3 — with 7 first-place votes.
Texas Tech stays at No. 2. Nebraska at No. 4.

The No. 1 race is as open as it's been all season. #CollegeSoftball #NFCA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
NFCA Week 12 poll breakdown: 🥎

No. 1 — Oklahoma (12 FPVs)
No. 2 — Texas Tech (4 FPVs)
No. 3 — Alabama (7 FPVs)
No. 4 — Nebraska

Alabama has MORE first-place votes than TTech but is ranked lower.
That gap will not last. #CollegeSoftball #RollTide

article.headline: NFCA Week 12 Poll: Oklahoma Holds No. 1 After Chaotic Week — Alabama Surges with 7 First-Place Votes

stories.title: **Headline:** Oklahoma Wins Series Over Arkansas 2-1 — Wells Hits HR No. 32, Now 5 From Record

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells is at 32 home runs. 🥎

She needs 5 more to tie Lauren Espinoza's all-time NCAA record of 37.
That record has stood since 1995.

OU won the ARK series 2-1. Wells hit No. 32 this weekend.
History is getting closer. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Oklahoma Wins Series Over Arkansas 2-1 — Wells Hits No. 32, Now Five Home Runs From All-Time Record

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska Sweeps Minnesota, Rises to No. 1 in Softball America — 17-1 Big Ten

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Nebraska swept Minnesota 17-2 and 11-2 this weekend. 🥎

36-6. 17-1 Big Ten. No. 1 in Softball America.

Wins over Texas, LSU, TTech, A&M, and SC already on the resume.

Nebraska is a national seed. Period. #Huskers #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Alabama Sweeps Kentucky for 6th Straight SEC Series Win — Crimson Tide Surging

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Alabama just swept Kentucky. 9-0. 5-4 walk-off. 4-0. 🥎

That's six straight SEC series wins.

Alabama has 7 first-place votes in the NFCA Week 12 poll.
The Crimson Tide are rolling at exactly the right time.

#RollTide #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** 2026 WCWS Bracketology — 32-Team Seeding, Stanford and A&M New Host Favorites

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The 2026 WCWS bracket is taking shape. 🥎

Stanford and A&M are new projected host favorites.
32-team seeding debuts this year.

Selection show: May 10. Regionals: May 15.

Tonight's FSU-Florida game shapes the seeds. #CollegeSoftball #WCWS

stories.title: **Headline:** Texas Tech's Final Road Trip — Canady and the Red Raiders Eye Big 12 Title Run

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech (42-4) heads out on its final road trip of the regular season. 🥎

NiJaree Canady is 17-3 after a midweek loss to Texas State.
She's still No. 2 in the NFCA Week 12 poll.

This team has one more month to make its case for a national seed. #TexasTech #CollegeSoftball
